description:
You are a Lab Manager responsible for equipment maintenance. Update the SciNote ELN record for the 'Mettler Toledo pH Meter' (Serial: MT-PH-001) in the 'Laboratory Equipment' inventory to certify it for use following its monthly calibration.

Login Credentials:
- E-mail: admin@scinote.net
- Password: inHisHouseAtRlyehDeadCthulhuWaitsDreaming

Update the record with the following details:
- Status: Operational
- Last Calibration: Today's date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Next Calibration: 30 days from today (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Maintenance Notes: Calibration passed. Slope 98%
